panels.description:
Сводная таблица утилизации GPU по устройствам

Ресурсы GPU запрашиваются использую PodSpec K8s для ресурса типа `nvidia.com/gpu`

targets.expr: max by (Hostname) (avg_over_time(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE[$__range]))

(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL)) by (Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL)) by(Hostname, device)) by(Hostname)) or (sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE) * 100) by(Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE)) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname)) or (sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE) * 100) by(Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE)) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname))
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK) * 1000000) by (Hostname)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK) * 1000000) by (Hostname)

100 * sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED)) by (Hostname) / clamp_min(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED)) by (Hostname) + sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE)) by (Hostname), 1)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_TX_BYTES)) by (Hostname)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_RX_BYTES)) by (Hostname)
sum(max(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE) by(Hostname, gpu)) by (Hostname)

panels.title: Summary

targets.expr: sum(max(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname)

(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname, device)) by(Hostname)) or (sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"}) * 100) by(Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname)) or (sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"}) * 100) by(Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname))

panels.description:
Утилизация тензорных ядер использующих HMMA*, основанная на продолжительности циклов их работы

*Half matrix multiplication and accumulation

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_TENSOR_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_TENSOR_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"}))by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname)

panels.title: GPU Tensor Core Utilization

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname)
max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"}))

100 * sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname) / clamp_min(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname) + sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname), 1)

100 * max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"})) / clamp_min(max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"})) + max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$node", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"})), 1)
100 * avg(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname)

panels.description: Утилизация графического движка, основанная на продолжительности его работы

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname)  / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname)

panels.title: GPU Graphics Engine Utilization

panels.description: Скорость передачи данных между графическими процессорами

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (rate(DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_BANDWIDTH_TOTAL{Hostname=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval]))) by(Hostname)

panels.title: GPU NVLink Activity

panels.description:
Скорость передачи данных через линию шины PCIe RX используя NVML*

*NVIDIA Management Library

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_RX_BYTES{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname)

panels.title: GPU PCIe Receive

panels.description:
Скорость передачи данных через линию шины PCIe TX используя NVML*

*NVIDIA Management Library

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_TX_BYTES{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname)

panels.title: GPU PCIe Transmit

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname) * 1000000
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK{Hostname=~"$node"})) by(Hostname) * 1000000
